alpha_grid.role: audit sweep only; continuous alpha_star is the authoritative share-match test so no match is missed between grid points

cases.description: path1 top-heavy, path2 the outlet mirror
cases.rationale: equal end-to-end conductance (equal uncoupled outlet shares) but very different mid-node pressures -> the primary structural-discrimination case
negative control: p1==p2 at every G_lat, q_lat==0, no lateral effect
unequal end-to-end conductances -> proxy can alter shares (partial mimicry)
outlet-side mirror of top_contrast: inlet- vs outlet-side asymmetry signature
guards against conclusions being an artifact of exact mirror symmetry
scaling check: pressures/shares unchanged vs mirror; dimensional flows x10

comparator: frozen uncoupled share-proxy completion (analysis.lateral_proxy.frozen_two_path_proxy): the exact ntube share homogenizer w<-(1-alpha)*w+alpha applied to unit-mean relative flows under the uncoupled completion (Q/Q0==1, one share through the whole depth, NO pressure law). NOT the complete dynamic streamtube model.
equalization_number_definition: Xi = G_lat*(1/A1 + 1/A2), Ai = gi_top+gi_bot; EXACT: for a nonzero uncoupled gap, gap/gap0 = 1/(1+Xi). The pressure_gap_class is driven by Xi (5%/95% cutoffs: Xi<0.05263157895 unchanged, Xi>=19 homogenized).
g_axial_reference_definition: mean of the two uncoupled end-to-end series conductances g_series(g_top,g_bot)=g_top*g_bot/(g_top+g_bot)
lambda_note: lambda_legacy_nominal is the axial-conductance-ratio grouping (WP6.3). Its 0.05 and 5 boundaries are LEGACY / PROVISIONAL NOMINAL labels kept for continuity — neither validated nor universal, and NOT the pressure classifier (Xi is).

models.proxy: frozen uncoupled share-proxy completion (frozen_two_path_proxy); has NO pressure law and holds total flow at the uncoupled value.

scope: FEASIBILITY discrimination only — NOT Paper-4; no experimental fit, no alpha->Lambda map, no transverse-permeability estimate, no claim espresso lies in any regime or that Lambda/Xi is measurable.
sign_convention: q_lat_1to2 = G_lat*(p1-p2) > 0 means flow path1 -> path2

three_distinct_notions.mathematical_distinguishability: no continuous alpha reproduces BOTH the outlet share and Q/Q0 — the joint_match_possible test.
three_distinct_notions.practical_experimental_resolvability: OPEN — requires an instrument/noise model that is NOT supplied here; never inferred from a nonzero synthetic difference.
three_distinct_notions.representational_non_equivalence: the proxy structurally cannot produce a pressure law (p1/p2/q_lat/distinct inlet-vs-outlet share) — always true, model-structural.
